description: DNSimple provides managed DNS hosting, domain registration, SSL certificate management, and related domain operations. It offers both a web application and developer tooling for automating account, domain, zone, and certificate workflows.
summary: DNSimple exposes a REST HTTP API v2 and an official DNSimple CLI; both use DNSimple-issued access tokens, and the API also documents HTTP Basic auth while OAuth 2.0 is used for app authorization and CLI browser login.
